_comment: Canonical class mapping for the shipped classifier weights. This file is regenerated by train.py / train_notebook.ipynb after each classifier training — the order produced there (sorted ImageFolder class_to_idx, i.e. alphabetical) becomes the authoritative order for the shipped weights. Keep in sync with DEFAULT_CLASS_NAMES in server/classifier.py. The current 9-class subset is the PlantVillage Tomato set (no yellow_leaf_curl). If you retrain on a different class set, regenerate this file.
